description: Charmbracelet builds open-source terminal UI libraries and command-line applications such as Glow, Gum, VHS, Mods, Crush, and Soft Serve. The charm.sh site is a product and project hub for those tools, plus installation/docs content and a public package repository.
summary: charm.sh exposes a public HTTP package repository at `https://repo.charm.sh/apt/`; the rest of the site primarily documents/open-links open-source CLIs and self-hosted software rather than hosted developer APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, or authenticated service surfaces on charm.sh itself.
